news.headline: Demandbase and Salesforce collaborate to integrate intent data into Sales Cloud Prospecting Center; announced on Dec 10, 2024.
news.summary: Today, Demandbase, a prominent account-based go-to-market platform for B2B enterprises, revealed a new integration. The company's intent data is now incorporated into the Salesforce Sales Cloud Prospecting Center. This collaboration with Salesforce aims to enhance sales efforts by providing valuable insights. This partnership was announced in San Francisco on Dec. 10, 2024.

news.headline: Kunes Auto & RV partners with Treehouse for EV charging solutions. Dec. 10, 2024 - Midwest group offers home charging for electric vehicle customers.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Milwaukee, the Kunes Auto & RV Group, a Midwest automotive group, revealed a new partnership with Treehouse, a specialized EV home charging installation company. This collaboration aims to offer complete home charging solutions for electric vehicle customers within its network.

news.headline: Baird Medical Group plans 2025 strategy after successful 2024. Meetings in Guangzhou. #BDMD #MedicalTech
news.summary: In early December 2024, Baird Medical Group (NASDAQ: BDMD), a prominent player in the field of minimally invasive medical technologies, hosted its annual review and planning meeting for the upcoming year in Guangzhou, China. The gathering took place at the Baird Capital Tower and spanned two days, serving as a platform for discussions and strategic planning for the year ahead.

news.headline: Flowfinity released insights to aid business leaders in overcoming obstacles to AI tech adoption for innovation.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia on December 10, 2024, Flowfinity, a prominent process management platform, released their recent findings aimed at assisting business executives in addressing common challenges that may impede the integration of new AI technologies and hinder innovation. The insights provided by Flowfinity aim to ensure businesses remain competitive in a rapidly evolving digital landscape.

news.headline: 37% of smart TV owners use Samsung most; 19th annual CONNECTIONS™ Summit at CES will address smart home growth.
news.summary: The 19th annual CONNECTIONS™ Summit at CES will focus on the expanding smart home sector with participation from key industry players including VIZIO, ADT Multifamily, Alarm.com, Johnson Controls, Nice Group, and others. Scheduled for December 10, 2024 in Dallas, the summit organized by Parks Associates will address the latest trends and innovations within the smart home industry.

news.headline: Rupert Murdoch plans to appeal after losing bid to give son Lachlan control of his empire in a legal defeat.
news.summary: Rupert Murdoch, a prominent media mogul, was unsuccessful in his attempt to modify a family trust in favor of his son Lachlan, ensuring control of the empire upon his passing. Despite this setback, the nonagenarian plans to challenge the decision through an appeal process.

news.headline: Asahi Kasei wins 2024 TSMC Excellent Performance Award for Pimel™ dielectric used in semiconductor packaging.
news.summary: Asahi Kasei, a company based in Tokyo and Novi, Mich., along with a branch in Düsseldorf, Germany, was recently honored with the prestigious 2024 TSMC Excellent Performance Award for its Pimel™ product. This recognition celebrates the outstanding achievements of Asahi Kasei in the industry.

news.headline: Kopin Corp. regains Nasdaq compliance with minimum bid price, receives letter from Nasdaq confirming compliance.
news.summary: Westborough, Massachusetts - Kopin Corporation (Nasdaq: KOPN), a prominent provider of specialized optical systems and high-performance microdisplays, shared today that it received a letter from Nasdaq. The letter noted that Kopin Corporation has managed to meet Nasdaq's requirement for minimum bid price for maintaining its listing on the Nasdaq Capital Market. This news indicates that the company's stock price has reached the necessary level for compliance. Kopin serves various sectors including defense, training, enterprise, industrial, consumer, and medical industries.

news.headline: Fitch Ratings: US elections to have repercussions for sovereign prospects of US and Canada.
LTIMindtree partners with GitHub to enhance AI-driven software engineering. $LTI. Strategic alliance for innovating tech.
news.summary: LTIMindtree, a prominent company listed on NSE as LTIM and BSE as 540005, has recently revealed a significant collaboration with GitHub, a leading developer platform powered by Copilot. This partnership is anticipated to bring about innovative solutions in the realm of Artificial Intelligence.

news.headline: Vital Data Tech partners with Mid-State Health Network to provide predictive models for mental health & substance use disorders.
news.summary: Vital Data Technology, a prominent company specializing in AI-driven health data analytics and medical management solutions for health plans, recently disclosed a partnership with Mid-State Health Network (MSHN) on December 10, 2024. The agreement entails the provision of predictive data models to enhance operations. The specifics of the deal and the impact on the healthcare sector remain undisclosed at this time. This collaboration signifies a strategic move by Vital Data Technology to advance its services and demonstrates the growing importance of data analytics in the healthcare industry.

news.headline: 365 Connect released Junk Fee Act compliance feature for marketing and leasing platform on Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: 365 Connect, a leading provider of automated marketing, leasing, and resident engagement platform for multifamily communities worldwide, has unveiled its latest offering, the Junk Fee Act Compliant unit selection. The release was announced on December 10, 2024, in New Orleans. This platform is designed to meet regulatory requirements and enhance the experience for tenants.

news.headline: Biomemory secures $18M in Series A funding led by Crédit Mutuel Innovation and French investors, to revolutionize data storage.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Biomemory, a leading DNA data storage company, has secured $18 million in Series A funding. The investment was spearheaded by Crédit Mutuel Innovation, with backing from the French Tech Seed fund through Bpifrance, within the France 2030 framework. Additionally, new investors such as Blast, managed by Bpifrance under the Deep Tech 2030 fund as a part of France 2030, as well as Paris Business Angels and Sorbonne, also participated in the funding round.

news.headline: Well Done Foundation introduces certified high-integrity carbon credits from orphan oil and gas wells to reduce carbon footprint.
news.summary: A nationwide nonprofit organization, the Well Done Foundation (WDF), based in Bozeman, Montana, has recently introduced its inaugural certified high-integrity carbon credits derived from orphaned oil and gas wells. The foundation aims to lessen carbon footprints and alleviate taxpayer burdens. This initiative was announced on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Accio Data and Intellicheck collaborate to enhance background screening process, benefitting employers and prospective employees.
news.summary: Accio Data, a prominent enterprise platform provider in the background screening industry, based in Melville, New York, has formed a strategic partnership with Intellicheck, Inc. (Nasdaq: IDN), a leading identity company. This collaboration aims to enhance background screening processes for employers and potential employees. By incorporating Intellicheck’s identity validation technology into Accio Data's advanced platform, the partnership seeks to streamline screening procedures. This partnership between Accio Data and Intellicheck, Inc. is poised to offer significant benefits to both employers and job seekers by simplifying the background verification process.

news.headline: Capterra's report in Arlington highlights the software buying process for B2B, emphasizing vendor list improvement.
news.summary: A recent report from Capterra in Arlington, Virginia sheds light on the software purchasing process used by businesses. The report highlights common pitfalls encountered when companies compile and assess vendors during this process. The study provides valuable insights into the challenges faced by businesses, emphasizing the importance of a thorough evaluation of vendors.

news.headline: Sapient transitions leadership with Jonathan Usuka as CEO and Mohit Jain as Chief Scientific Officer, focusing on growth and innovation.
news.summary: San Diego-based company Sapient, specializing in multi-omics discovery, revealed a leadership transition for further growth and scientific influence. Jonathan Usuka, Ph.D., MBA, presently the Chief Business Officer, will take over as the Chief Executive Officer. Founder Mohit Jain, M.D., Ph.D., will shift to the role of Chief Scientific Officer while remaining on the Sapient Board. This change aims to drive the company's expansion and technological advancements.

news.headline: Inocras receives ISO 15189 accreditation from ANAB for whole genome sequencing, making it one of few companies with CAP/CLIA/ISO 15189 lab for cancer testing.
news.summary: In San Diego, the ANSI ASQ National Accreditation Board (ANAB) has granted accreditation to the ISO 15189 standard to Inocras Inc., a company specializing in whole genome sequencing and bioinformatics. This accreditation falls under the ISO 15189 Medical Laboratories Accreditation Program. Inocras is distinguished as one of the limited firms globally with a CAP/CLIA/ISO 15189 accredited laboratory executing whole genome sequencing for cancer. Notably, the accreditation aligns with the International Organization for Standardization (ISO) 15189 standards.

news.headline: Corpay named Global FX Partner of UFC, in exclusive agreement. Excited to work with premier MMA org.
news.summary: In Toronto, Corpay, Inc. (NYSE: CPAY), a top player in corporate payments, has revealed that their Cross-Border business recently inked a deal with UFC, the leading MMA organization globally, to serve as their official and sole Global Foreign Exchange (FX) Partner. Brad Loder, Ch expressed enthusiasm for this collaboration, calling it a significant step in their partnership with UFC.

news.headline: IPA reported financial results for Q2 of its 2025 fiscal year. They unveiled in silico drug discovery tools.
news.summary: In Victoria, British Columbia, Immunoprecise Antibodies Ltd. (IPA), a biotherapeutic research and technology company traded on NASDAQ under IPA, disclosed its financial results for Q2 of FY25 ending on October 31, 2024. The company introduced innovative in silico drug discovery tools during this quarter. All figures are in Canadian dollars.

news.headline: Arab National Bank uses Riverbed solutions for digital banking upgrade, enhancing customer experiences, in Calif and Saudi Arabia.
news.summary: In Redwood City, California, and Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, the Arab National Bank has utilized Riverbed's observability and AIOps solutions for a significant digital banking improvement. This initiative aims to enhance customer experiences through a major upgrade in their digital banking services.

news.headline: TradeStation Securities introduces HUB for clients, enhancing onboarding & account management. Replaces Client Center.
news.summary: In Plantation, Florida, TradeStation Securities, Inc. has introduced HUB, a new central portal for applicants and clients. This online brokerage firm specializes in trading stocks, options, futures, and futures options. HUB aims to enhance user experience by offering a more streamlined platform compared to its predecessor, the Client Center. This upgrade is part of TradeStation's commitment to providing quality service, as the company is known for its award-winning status. The HUB launch signifies a significant shift in how clients can access their account information and customize their trading experience.

news.headline: TP-Link partners with Anaheim Ducks, becoming an official sponsor starting 2024-25 NHL season, strengthening ties in SoCal.
news.summary: TP-Link Systems Inc., a prominent networking and smart home solutions company headquartered in Irvine, California, has revealed a new multi-year affiliation with the Anaheim Ducks. This partnership will see TP-Link becoming an Official Team Sponsor starting from the 2024-25 NHL season. It marks a strong investment in the local community, as TP-Link's global headquarters are situated in Southern California. Fans of the Ducks will have the opportunity to engage with TP-Link's cutting-edge technology offerings through this collaboration.

news.headline: Capitolis named to Inc.’s 2024 Best in Business list for Financial Services and Innovation & Technology. Celebrates achievements.
news.summary: Capitolis, a technology company focused on enhancing capital markets safety and vibrancy, has been named to the Inc. 2024 Best in Business list in the Financial Services and Innovation & Technology sectors. This prestigious annual award by Inc. acknowledges companies that have significantly influenced their industries and society as a whole. Capitolis' recognition is a testament to its innovative contributions and impact in the financial services and technology realms.

news.headline: CyberArk gets FIDO2 certification for Workforce Identity platform, boosting cyber resilience.
news.summary: CyberArk, a leader in identity security (NASDAQ: CYBR), based in Newton, Mass. and Petach Tikva, Israel, has recently disclosed that CyberArk Workforce Identity, part of the CyberArk Identity Security Platform, has been granted FIDO2 certification from the FIDO Alliance. The FIDO Alliance aims to diminish global dependence on passwords. This certification underlines CyberArk's dedication to enhancing cyber resilience.

news.headline: Tempus to present 4 abstracts at 2024 San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium, showing dedication to precision medicine.
news.summary: Tempus, a prominent company in artificial intelligence and precision medicine, shared that they have had four abstracts approved for presentation at the upcoming 2024 San Antonio Breast Cancer Symposium. This event will take place from December 10 to 13 in San Antonio, Texas. Dr. Ezra Cohen, Tempus’ Chief Medical Officer of Oncology, emphasized the significance of this opportunity, stating that it highlights Tempus’ dedication to progressing precision medicine for individuals affected by breast cancer.

news.headline: 365 Data Centers partners with Connectbase to improve visibility and connectivity, enhancing service offerings.
news.summary: Norwalk, Connecticut - In a recent development, 365 Data Centers has disclosed a key collaboration with Connectbase aimed at boosting insight into its service options. The partnership is expected to provide significant benefits for both parties involved, particularly in terms of expanding visibility.

news.headline: LiveOak Fiber is expanding high-speed fiber network in Florida's Emerald Coast.
news.summary: LiveOak Fiber has revealed plans for the continuous expansion and activation of its high-speed fiber-optic network along Florida's Emerald Coast. This initiative aims to provide improved connectivity in the region and cater to the growing demand for faster internet services. The network expansion project is set to cover a significant area and is expected to benefit a large number of residents and businesses in the region.

news.headline: ImmunoPrecise Antibodies (NASDAQ:IPA) Q2 earnings released, missed estimates by -40.0%, reporting EPS of $-0.07.
news.summary: ImmunoPrecise Antibodies (NASDAQ: IPA) released their Q2 earnings on Tuesday, December 10, 2024, at 08:30 AM. The company fell short of expected earnings by -40.0%, disclosing an EPS of $-0.07. For further details, the complete article can be accessed on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Academy Sports + Outdoors reports 3rd-quarter 2024 results: Net sales down 3.9%, comp sales -4.9%. GAAP EPS $0.92, adjusted EPS $0.98. Plans to open 20-25 new stores in 2025. New $700 million share repurchase program authorized. Financial highlights, store openings, dividend, and guidance shared.
news.summary: Academy Sports and Outdoors reported a (3.9)% decline in net sales and a (4.9)% drop in comparable sales for the third quarter of 2024. The company achieved a GAAP diluted EPS of $0.92 and $0.98 for adjusted diluted EPS. Year-to-date, GAAP operating cash flow increased by 29% and adjusted free cash flow rose by 67% compared to the previous year. Academy opened 16 new stores in fiscal 2024, expanded into Ohio, and narrowed its fiscal 2024 net sales guidance to $5.89B to $5.94B. They also authorized a new $700 million share repurchase program and plan to open 20 to 25 new stores in fiscal 2025. Shareholder returns included repurchasing approximately one million shares and declaring a quarterly cash dividend. Inventory management improved, with inventories well-managed. Academy is expecting a strong fourth quarter and holiday season, and their fiscal 2024 guidance has been updated. The company's overall strategy includes returning capital to shareholders, ongoing investments, and focused growth in store openings. Annual unit growth is targeted at approximately 7.5% in 2025.

news.headline: United Natural Foods Inc beat analyst estimates with a 4.2% increase in sales, totaling $7.87 billion in Q1 FY25. Adjusted EBITDA rose by 14.5% to $134 million.
news.summary: United Natural Foods Inc (NYSE:UNFI) saw a surge in its shares following the company's announcement of its first-quarter FY25 earnings. The company experienced a 4.2% rise in sales compared to the previous year, reaching $7.87 billion, surpassing analysts' expectations of $7.61 billion. This growth was primarily fueled by a 2% increase in wholesale unit volumes, driven by new business from existing and new customers as well as inflation pressures. However, the gross margin decreased to 13.2% from 13.6% due to lower product margin rates and shifts in the business mix. Despite this, gross profit increased by 0.8% to $1.0 billion. Adjusted EBITDA also saw a notable uptick, rising by 14.5% to $134 million.

news.headline: Academy Sports (NASDAQ: ASO) Q3 earnings missed estimates by -23.0%, reporting EPS of $0.98. More on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Sporting goods retailer Academy Sports, trading under NASDAQ as ASO, unveiled its Q3 earnings report on December 10, 2024, at 08:00 AM. Despite expectations, the company fell short on earnings, recording an EPS of $0.98 -23.0% below the projected amount. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Designer Brands (NYSE:DBI) Q3 earnings miss, EPS 27 cents, below 35 cents view. Net sales $777.2M, down 1.2%. Total comparable sales down 3.1%. CEO cites warm weather, economic uncertainty as factors.
news.summary: Shares of Designer Brands Inc. (NYSE:DBI) are down today after the company posted third-quarter results below expectations. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of 27 cents, falling short of the projected 35 cents. Third-quarter net sales dipped by 1.2% to $777.2 million, with total comparable sales down by 3.1%. This missed analyst estimates of $802.14 million. CEO Doug Howe attributed the challenges to warm weather and economic uncertainty affecting consumer spending. The full article can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Tile of Spain reveals winners of 2024 Awards for Architecture, recognizing innovative projects.
news.summary: Tile of Spain, a renowned international brand encompassing over 100 ceramic tile manufacturers under the Spanish Ceramic Tile Manufacturers Association (ASCER), has revealed the recipients of the 23rd edition of the Tile of Spain Awards of Architecture. The announcement was made in Miami on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Rachael Ray introduces ceramic nonstick cookware collection without harmful substances to celebrate 20th anniversary in 2025.
news.summary: In Vallejo, California on December 10, 2024, the launch of the new Rachael Ray Cucina Ceramic Nonstick Cookware collection signifies Rachael Ray's entry into ceramic cookware. This collection offers an alternative nonstick coating free of PTFE, PFAS, lead, or cadmium, aimed at health-conscious consumers. As Rachael Ray gears up for its 20th anniversary in 2025, this latest innovation showcases the brand's commitment to evolving with the times and meeting the demand for safer cookware options.

news.headline: Energy Capital Partners and co-investors' acquisition approved by the High Court of Justice of England and Wales.
news.summary: The High Court of Justice of England and Wales has granted approval for the acquisition by Energy Capital Partners and co-investors. This deal involves a significant investment in the energy sector and marks a key milestone for the companies involved. The acquisition was finalized after meeting all legal requirements and receiving the court's authorization. This move signifies a substantial transaction in the industry, with the total investment amounting to [insert specific number] million dollars. The court's decision reflects confidence in the deal and its potential benefits for the energy market.

news.headline: Apollo Art Auctions' Dec. 15 auction showcases rare Egyptian treasures from Prince Collection, including granite head, vessel, and sandstone relief.
news.summary: A collection of Egyptian artifacts recently unveiled in London features a unique granite head of a pharaoh, a large vessel adorned with a painted image of the Nile scene, and a sandstone relief from the Amarna Period depicting a pharaoh in worship of the god Aton. Additionally, the exhibit showcases exquisite Greek and Roman jewelry. Scheduled for public viewing starting December 15, 2024, at Apollo Art, these treasures offer a glimpse into ancient civilizations and their artistic prowess.

news.headline: William C. Huff introduces White Glove Transportation services in Naples, Fla., offering top-notch care for valuable goods.
news.summary: In Naples, Florida, on December 10, 2024, William C. Huff has launched a new premium White Glove Transportation service. This service is specifically designed to cater to the needs of moving high-value and delicate items with the highest level of care and expertise. This catered service is aimed at businesses and offers specialized transportation services.

news.headline: Multifamily investment outlook for 2025 positive - rents & construction costs to rise, banks face losses, inflation to increase.
news.summary: In Chicago on December 10, 2024, investment firm Origin Investments expects a rise in multifamily rents and construction costs for the upcoming year 2025. They anticipate that changes in banks' strategies, particularly the "extend and pretend" approach, will lead to substantial losses across the industry. In addition, inflation is forecasted to go up, impacting consumer prices.

news.headline: KMS Lighthouse recognized in The Forrester Wave™ evaluation of knowledge management solutions 2024.
news.summary: In Tel Aviv, Israel, on December 10, 2024, KMS Lighthouse Limited, a prominent player in knowledge management on a global scale, was featured in The Forrester Wave™ evaluation of knowledge management solutions 2024. This recognition underscores their dedication to providing cutting-edge solutions.

news.headline: Healthier Capital invests in Hyro with $50 million, advancing AI solutions in healthcare. Former One Medical CEO leads.
news.summary: Hyro, a prominent provider of voice and chat AI solutions in the healthcare sector, has recently secured additional growth capital. The latest funding round has brought the total amount raised by Hyro to $50 million. This capital infusion will be utilized to enhance their conversational and generative AI technologies, with a focus on expanding their presence in key channels and segments within the healthcare industry. The announcement was made on December 10, 2024, in New York.

news.headline: Enzymedica launches SubCulture™ probiotics line to target bloat, mood, women's health. Includes foundational strains.
news.summary: A new line of probiotics containing clinically researched foundational strains for digestion, regularity, and immune health has been introduced by Enzymedica® in Venice, Florida. Launched on December 10, 2024, the products are designed to support overall well-being.

news.headline: 2024 Understanding China Conference in Guangzhou, ends successfully after three days, gathers political leaders, scholars, business executives, and international organizations for insightful discussions on Chinese modernization.
news.summary: The recent Understanding China International Conference held in Guangzhou, China, concluded on December 10, 2024, after a three-day event filled with valuable discussions. The conference brought together various key figures, including political leaders, scholars, business executives, and representatives from international organizations. The event served as a platform for exchanging ideas and insights on a wide range of topics related to China.

news.headline: Giving Compass appoints Milan Ball as Director of Development and Partnerships, and Kavitha Thimmaiah as Director of Donor Education to drive philanthropic partnerships.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Giving Compass, a prominent player in donor education, revealed the appointment of two key executives to its leadership team. Milan Ball has been welcomed as the Director of Development and Partnerships, and Kavitha Thimmaiah will assume the position of Director of Donor.

news.headline: Novatech partners with Equalis Group to offer nationwide contract benefits to public agencies.
news.summary: In a recent press release dated December 10, 2024, Novatech, a prominent nationwide provider of Managed Office Solutions based in Nashville, Tennessee, shared the news that public agencies throughout the United States now have the opportunity to benefit from its extensive technology offerings. This access is facilitated through a simplified procurement process, making it easier for public entities to leverage Novatech's comprehensive portfolio of solutions.

news.headline: Dorot Gardens® introduces 'Wilt Insurance' program, trade-in wilted herbs for coupon; launched Dec 10 2024.
news.summary: Recently in Bayonne, New Jersey, Dorot Gardens® announced the unveiling of its 'Wilt Insurance' program on Dec. 10, 2024. The program offers a distinctive opportunity for individuals to trade in their wilted herbs in return for a coupon. Dorot Gardens® is renowned for its fresh-frozen, pre-portioned herbs and garlic products. This initiative aims to provide customers with an incentive to exchange their wilted herbs for a coupon towards the purchase of new products.

news.headline: 83% consumers prioritize credit card perks. Survey by CardRates, revealed 73% choose based on perks.
news.summary: In Gainesville, Florida, on December 10, 2024, a recent survey carried out by CardRates.com indicated a clear trend in consumer behavior regarding credit cards. The study highlighted that 73% of participants are placing a significant emphasis on credit card perks when considering opening a new credit card account. This survey reflects a growing interest among consumers in leveraging the benefits offered by credit cards, as reported by the leading financial resource aiming to enhance consumer knowledge about credit card usage and advantages.

news.headline: Santa's North Pole home undergoes modern makeover by Revive Real Estate's design team in Irvine; 200+ years old.
news.summary: In a festive celebration of the holiday season, Santa and Mrs. Claus have decided to give their legendary North Pole cabin a magical makeover after over two centuries of Christmas traditions. The announcement, made today in Irvine, California, marks a significant milestone in their timeless story.

news.headline: CEO Coaching Intl. celebrates BCC Engineering's $230M sale to Parsons Corp., led by CEO Jose Muñoz. Global growth success!
news.summary: In Miami on December 10, 2024, CEO Coaching International, a prominent executive coaching firm for growth-oriented CEOs and entrepreneurs worldwide, celebrates the successful sale of its client BCC Engineering, LLC (BCC) to Parsons. The firm extends its congratulations to BCC and President/CEO Jose Muñoz on this achievement.

news.headline: Italy's loyalty programs market set to grow by 10.5% to $4.21 billion in 2024, with future growth dynamics to 2028 - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: In Dublin, a report titled "Italy Loyalty Programs Market Intelligence and Future Growth Dynamics Databook" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The loyalty market in Italy is projected to experience a 10.5% annual growth, with an expected value of US$4.21 billion by 2024. The country's loyalty market has shown a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) in value terms.
